title: hieracium altaicum
intro: Hieracium altaicum, also known as Russian Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion-like flowering plants family Asteraceae. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium altaicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and respiratory problems.
